description: Style Note Have a blast on the field, or when you're out on an everyday jog, with these comfortable shoes from gas. These shoes come with cool urban styling and a comfortable structure, and are worth adding to your wardrobe as they're also a perfect casual option when teamed with jeans and tees. Product Details Brown shoe with central lace-ups, overlays and stitched detailing A padded tongue and inner Tough rubber textured outsole Thick TPU outsole with multi-directional grooves and suction points Material and Care Synthetic and suede Do not store in direct sunlight Remove dust and dirt with dry clean cloth
